description.value: You have advantage over hearing-based checks on Wisdom (Perception).

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have advantage on sight-based Perception checks. Your darkvision extends out to 120 feet.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You do not suffer the harsh climatic conditions of winter or the cold and do not consider snowcovered terrain difficult.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can hold your breath underwater for a number of minutes equal to 8 + your Constitution modifier.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can move through the spaces of larger creatures without penalty.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Male Deer and male Moose  have a boney structures on their head, called antlers. Although they are not real horns, they function as such. Given their large size, you inflict 1d6 + your Strength modifier instead of the normal damage when you make a horn attack, but they create difficulties for you when attempting to hide and gives you disadvantage to Stealth checks when attempting to hide.
You have proficiency in the Acrobatics skill and have advantage on Dexterity-based saving throws.

effects.label: AC is 17, unaffected by Dex bonus

description.value: The hard scales that cover the body of an Armadillo give you a base AC of 17 (your Dexterity bonus does not affect this number). Armor does not offer any additional benefit, though bonuses from shields are applied normally.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Your sensory and mnemonic abilities allow you to always find your way back to a familiar place, even after traveling some distance into unknown territories.

Only the male Bovinae have large horns. Given your large size, your horns inflict 1d6 + your strength modifier damage modifier instead of the normal damage of an horn attack, but they create difficulties for you when attempting to hide and gives you disadvantage to Stealth checks when attempting to hide.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can use your bite as a natural weapon to make an unarmed strike. It deals 1d4 + your Strength modifier piercing damage.

If you travel more than 20 feet and hit with a melee attack that uses Strength, the target must pass a your saving throw with DC 8 + character proficiency bonus + character Strength bonus or fall prone.
You have expertise in the Deception skill and have advantage in Wisdom (Insight) checks to determine if someone is trying to deceive you.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have advantage on saving throws against fear.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have the reputation, throughout Vesteria, to be a bearer of misfortune if sighted on the battlefield. When an opponent rolls a natural 20 on an attack or saving throw, and you can see it, you can use your reaction to turn that 20 into a 1. You can use this ability again after finishing a short rest.
You are immune to charm and fear effects.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have proficiency in the Perception skill. Other creatures gain no advantage in attacking you while hidden.
Always careful, attacks of opportunity made against you have disadvantage.
Immediately after performing a Dash Action and having traveled at least 20 feet, you can perform a horn attack as a bonus action, or an unarmed attack if you do not have one.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: An Anteater can use their claws to make an unarmed strike, with which they have proficiency. This attack deals 1d4 slashing damage.
You are an excellent rock climber. On rocky walls you gain a climbing speed is 20 feet, and you automatically succeed on any climbing-based checks.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks to move silently on dry land.
A Rossetto has advantage in checks with the camouflage kit to look like a Theri, a Canide or a Licae.

When you fall from a height of less than 60 feet and are not incapacitated, you can make a Dexterity saving throw with DC equal to the number of feet divided by 3, and not suffer fall damage, or half that damage if they fail. If you fall from more than 60 feet, you can make a Dexterity saving throw with DC 18 +1 for every 3 feet beyond the 60th to half the fall damage.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You are immune to the effects of fear.
You have advantage on Charisma (Intimidate) checks involving creatures smaller than yourself.
You can ball yourself up while falling, taking 1d6 less fall damage than normal.
You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks based on your sense of smell.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: While flying, you can use your claws as a natural weapon to make an unarmed strike. They inflict 1d6 + your Strength modifier piercing damage, unlike the normal bludgeoning damage of an unarmed strike.

The innate ability to use ultrasound to understand the surrounding area guarantees you perfect vision in low light conditions. You can map the surrounding physical space and the objects or creatures that move inside it, up to 60 feet away. You are unable to distinguish colors or textures, only shapes, and you cannot see beyond physical objects and barriers. Other creatures gain no advantage on attack rolls made against you as a result of being hidden.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: A Falcon does not make attacks of opportunity when flying out of an enemy’s range after a claw attack. They must travel at least 15 feet in flight before making an attack.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You do not trigger attacks of opportunity if you use a Dash action to move away from an enemy.

You can hold your breath underwater for a number of minutes equal to 5 + their Constitution modifier. An Armadillo is always able to float or surface if they do not carry a load heavier than themselves.
You can spend your reaction to redirect an attack targeting you towards another ally within 5 feet. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to your Intelligence modifier.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can make yourself understood and communicate simple messages in an exceptional way, even if only through your facial expressions.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can fly continuously for 12 hours before starting to feel fatigued.

You have a highly developed sense of touch and can recognize the material properties of an object simply by holding it in your hand. To do this, you must pass an Intelligence (Nature) check with DC 12.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can attempt to fascinate another creature for 1 minute with the movement of your plumage using an action, to avoid it, the target creature must pass a Charisma saving throw with DC equal to 8 + your Charisma modifier + your proficiency bonus. If the save fails, the target sees the caster as a person they trust and love. Non-intelligent creatures are not affected. The target responds appropriately, following the caster around as long as this doesn't pose a risk to their safety. The fascinated condition also ends if the target becomes aggressive towards the fascinated creature. This ability can be used again after finishing a short rest.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: At the end of a long rest, you can spend an hour practicing a particular activity. If they do so, you gain proficiency in a skill related to that activity until your next long rest.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: If you do not have disadvantage, you gain advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.
You have advantage on attack rolls against creatures larger than yourself.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: If you are hit by an opponent, you can use your reaction to gain advantage on attack rolls against that opponent until the end of their next turn.
Your thick fleece protects you from the soften some blows, increasing your AC by 1.

When in combat, you may enter a state of fury. While in this state, your bite attack deals 1d6 piercing damage instead of the normal amount, and you temporarily ignore the effects of any levels of exhaustion. This fury lasts for a number of rounds equal to your Constitution modifier, and may only be used again following the completion of a long or short rest.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: If you successfully grapple a creature, you can use your reaction to make a bite attack against that creature. A bite attack is an unarmed strike that deals 1d4 piercing damage.

Your incisors are overdeveloped, allowing you to easily gnaw through materials such as wood, rope, paper, plaster etc. They are considered a tool in which you have proficiency, comparable to a working knife.
You are always successful when attempting to gather food thanks to Pigs peculiarity of considering edible things that practically no one else would consider eating.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have proficiency in the Sleight of hand skill and have advantage in Grabbing checks and opposing checks to maintain your grip.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You always remembers every detail, place or person they have seen.

The impact from headbutt is something that nobody wants to experience. After an opponent has been hit by your horn attack, they must make a Strength saving throw (DC 8 + your Strength modifier + your proficiency bonus). They fall prone if they fail this saving throw.
You can use your bonus action to use the Help action.
You can spend their reaction to gain advantage on the attack roll against a creature that is within 5 feet of your ally or perform a Help action to assist an ally against an opponent 5 feet from you.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You may use your horns (if they have them) as a natural weapon, to perform an unarmed strike. If it hits, it inflicts 1d4 + your Strength modifier piercing damage.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Only some male Sheep have horns, which create difficulties when attempting to hide and gives you disadvantage on Stealth checks when attempting to hide.
You are immune to disease.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can inflate the muscles of your body and stretch your spine to gain several inches in height. This gives you advantage on Charisma checks (Intimidate) against creatures shorter than yourself.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can use your claws to make an unarmed strike. Claws are considered a finesse weapon and can roll 1d4 slashing damages instead of the normal unarmed strike damage.
You have expertise in the use of your incisors as a tool, managing to gnaw trees or entire wooden structures like a saw.
You can attempt to hide even if only obscured by a single creature, so long as it is at least one size larger than you.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You never become lost, and can always determine the direction of North.
You can perform a jump of a distance equal to 1 foot, multiplied by twice their Strength bonus, instead of the normal bonus.
When calculating how far you may travel when jumping, you may travel an additional 5 feet.
You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) skill check that are based on smell and hearing.

Male Deer boney structures on their head, called antlers. Although they are not real horns, they function as such. Given their large size, you inflict 1d6 + your Strength modifier instead of the normal damage when you make a horn attack, but they create difficulties for you when attempting to hide and gives you disadvantage to Stealth checks when attempting to hide.
You have particularly elastic cheeks which you can expand and use to store food or other objects, up to a maximum weight of 6 1/2 lbs.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You may not use your flying speed for two consecutive turns and cannot rise more than 10 feet above the ground.
You may jump or take a Dash action as a bonus action.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: When you roll 1 on an attack roll, or a saving throw, you can re-roll the dice. You must use the new result.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You advantage on Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks made while in flight and can make a Dexterity saving throw instead of Constitution saving throw to maintain Concentration while in flight.
You have advantage when making rolls to resist being pushed or grabbed.

You cannot use tools, heavy weapons or anything that requires the use of two hands while flying. Flying with membranous wings requires concentration and you will crash if you use your wings in any other way. If you perform a Dash action while in flight, you gain an increase in movement equal to twice your flying speed.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: If you use your first action in combat to prepare an attack action, you have advantage to the throw to hit that attack.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You are treated as if your size were Large when determining how much you can carry or move.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: When creating the character, you choose an area of origin between urban or wilderness. You have advantage in Dexterity (Stealth) checks carried out to hide within your chosen territory.
You may move through the spaces of any larger creature and pass through any crevice or space as long as you can get your head through.
You have advantage on Charisma (Performance) checks relating to singing.
You are very sensitive to mystical presences, managing to perceive supernatural entities through smell.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have advantage on saving throws against fear and avoiding being fascinated by creatures other than Peacocks.
Your fleece also ensures good thermal insulation, granting you advantage on saving throws against cold conditions.
You have proficiency in the Nature skill, and your proficiency bonus to this skill is doubled on any check involving soil or rock,
An Anteater has advantage when defending against a Shove attack.

A Skunk can use an action to emit a fetid spray in a straight line for 10 feet.Each creature in this line must make a Dexterity saving throw with DC 8 + your Constitution bonus + your proficiency bonus. If they fail this saving throw, a sprayed creature becomes poisoned for one minute and a disgusting rotten smell persists on its body for up to a week, causing their presence to be smelled from up to 60 feet in the right wind conditions.

You have the innate ability to release a strong odor, capable of marking an object or a place and interpretable only by Familia members. These odorous messages can be a personal signature or an indication of an emotional state and can persist up to a week depending on the desired intensity.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: When making attacks of opportunity, you gain advantage on those attack rolls.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Your beak deals 1d4 points of damage instead of the normal damage of an unarmed attack. You may use your bonus action to make an attack with your beak as if it were the second weapon of a two-weapon attack.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You may use your beak to make unarmed attacks, dealing piercing damage instead of bludgeoning damage.

You are in possession of a peripheral vision developed up to 310°. For this reason, they cannot be caught off guard by attacks from behind, and your opponents cannot gain advantage when attacking you while you are flanked.
You have advantage on saving throws against poisoning and poison damage.

Any creature that grasps, is grabbed, or comes into prolonged direct contact your’s mold-filled fur must succeed in a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or gain the poisoned condition for 1 minute. A poisoned creature no longer in direct contact with you can re-roll the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the poisoning condition if successful.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have disadvantage on sight-based Wisdom (Perception) checks.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have developed prehensile hind legs that you can use to grasp objects in a simple way; that is, you can handle them, but are not treated as being proficient with any weapon, tool, or action, that would require the use of two legs simultaneously. An Avian needs at least one free leg to be able to stand still on the ground or hang from something.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can make a long jump with a distance of 1ft multiplied by double your Strength bonus. This replaces the normal calculation for making a long jump.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: If your ally is hit by an opponent, you may use your reaction to get a +1 bonus on rolls to hit that opponent until the end of your next round.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: When disadvantaged, a Felid will take advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Your fur features sharp spines on your back, which grant you a +1 bonus to your armor class. In any round when you are physically attacking, or physically attacked by, an opponent, that opponent takes 1 point of piercing damage from your spines.

Your back is covered in sharp quills. These can be used to perform an unarmed strike. This deals 1d4 + your Strength modifier piercing damage, . Whenever a creature begins its turn grappling or grappled by you, it takes 1d4 piercing damage.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: While flying, you can use your claws as a natural weapon to make an unarmed strike. They inflict 1d6 + your Strength modifier piercing damage, unlike the normal bludgeoning damage of an unarmed strike.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can use your hooked beak as a natural weapon to make an unarmed strike. It inflicts 1d4 + your Strength modifier piercing damage.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have advantage on Intelligence-based saving throws.
When you drop to 0 hit points but not killed instantly, you may decide to stay at 1 hit point. This ability can be used again only after finishing a long rest.
You may re-roll a saving throw and keep the second result. You may only do this once before taking a long or short rest.

You can curl up to better protect yourself with your armor. To ball yourself up you must use a Bonus Action. While you are rolled up, you have advantage on Constitution saving throws and your opponents have disadvantage when attacking you, and the only action you can take is to return to a standing position. While you are rolled up, your speed is 0 and cannot be increased, and you cannot use your reaction.
You have advantage in Dexterity (Stealth) checks to hide from pursuers during an escape, at the cost of gaining a level of exhaustion immediately afterwards.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have expertise on Intelligence (Nature) checks involving seeds or crops.
You have advantage on skill checks made to break an object.
You can carry up to a third of your weight and a third of their size in the pouch of your beak.
You always understands the evolution of the weather in maritime areas and have the ability to find the best currents and the best time to venture to sea.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Barn Owls can make a sharp screech that confuses and stuns their opponents. Each creature within 20 feet of you must pass a Constitution saving throw with DC 8 + Constitution bonus + your proficeincy bonus or become stunned for 1 round. You can use this ability again after finishing a short rest.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have advantage when making Wisdom (Insight or Medicine) skill checks to determine the physical state and mental health of a creature who they can observe for at least 1 minute.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Your have disadvantage over sight based checks of Wisdom (Perception) when exposed to strong daylight.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have disadvantage to attack rolls in bright conditions.
You have advantage on non-vision-based Wisdom (Perception) checks.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Unlike the flight of the other Avians, that of the Strige is extremely silent and does not produce the classic noise of flapping wings. You take advantage of the Dexterity (Stealth) checks to avoid being noticed while you are flying.
Creatures have advantage in the Medicine skill for all checks performed on you.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can use tools without using your wings and may gain proficiency in a tool when using the Fast Learning skill.

you cannot perform the Dash action. Unsuitable for harsh climates. You are unable to regulate your internal temperature and for this reason particularly suffer from the cold. You have disadvantage to saving throws against cold, and suffer double the level of exhaustion caused by the effects of cold, and are vulnerable to cold damage.
You do not need to drink, and after eating their fill you can survive without food for a month. This kind of metabolism makes you immune to the most common poisons and poison type damage.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: If you hit an opponent smaller than yourself with a claw attack, you may lift it off the ground.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You gain advantage when making rolls regarding social interactions with non-hostile sentient creatures.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You always wake up naturally a few minutes before sunrise and are always aware of the time.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can always perceive the purity of a liquid that you can observe closely, managing to identify the presence of harmful or polluting external elements.
When a Levri uses the Dash action, their speed increases by an additional 20 feet.
You always treat any levels of exhaustion as one lower; if you have only one level of exhaustion you may ignore its effect.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have advantage in Wisdom (Insight) checks, in assessing whether a situation could present a threat or a deception.
You do not suffer from the exhaustion levels caused by a lack of rest due either to a long journey or a prolonged endurance effort.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You have advantage on Constitution saving throws against effects that would stun you.
You have advantage on Constitution saving throws that would lead to acquiring a condition.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can spend an action to produce a sweet song that refreshes the soul and body of your companions. Any ally within 50 feet that can hear you can ignore one level of exhaustion for a minute. This ability can be used again after finishing a short rest.
A Domesti requesting help from creatures larger than them, has advantage in Charisma checks (Persuasion).

You can use a rudimentary form of echolocation to better understand the environment that surrounds you up to 15 ft. This ability allows you to understand the thickness and materials of walls and floors, as well as locate any empty spaces beyond them. You can also detect invisible objects.
You have a naturally thick, hard-to-penetrate skin which gives you a +1 armor class bonus.
The thick tail of an Anteater is used for defensive purposes, granting a +1 bonus to your Armor Class.
You reduce any non-magical bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage by 1, to a minimum of 1.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You do not gain levels of exhaustion due to heavy or long-lasting work.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Unlike the other Avians, a Barn Owl can also use their claw attack from the ground by placing themselves prone, but without having disadvantage to attack rolls.
You have advantage in Wisdom (Survival) checks when tracking.
You can use your tusks as a natural weapon to make an unarmed strike. If it hits, it inflicts 1d4 + your Strength modifier piercing damage.
You half all damage from crushing and falling due to your elastic physical structure that allows you to withstand strong pressure without suffering damage.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can use your bite as a natural weapon to make an unarmed strike. If it hits it inflicts 1+ the piercing damage Constitution modifier, unlike the normal bludgeoning damage of an unarmed strike. Additionally,you recover an amount of hit points equal to the damage done with the bite.

If you successfully grapple a creature, you can use your reaction to make a bite attack against that creature. A bite attack is an unarmed strike that deals 1d4 piercing damage. In addition, any creature struck must make a Constitution Saving throw (DC 10 + your proficiency bonus) or become poisoned for one minute.

You cannot use your legs to grasp objects, but rather use your beak on your long, articulated neck or their wings. On any turn that you take the Dash action while swimming, you may double your movement.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: You can use your wings for simple interactions with objects but cannot handle or hold them. Flying with wings requires concentration and you fall if you use them in any other way. If you perform the Dash action while in flight, your flying speed is doubled for the turn.

magicitems.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Your beak deals 1d4 points of damage instead of the normal damage of an unarmed attack. You may use your bonus action to make an attack with your beak as if it were the second weapon of a two-weapon attack.
You have advantage on Strength checks to move or grapple creature.
